input.prompt: We need to migrate every legacy authentication path to use the new identity provider. This includes the SAML SSO flow, the legacy username/password local accounts, the OAuth integrations with GitHub and Google, the API token authentication used by service accounts, the magic-link email login used by customer support, and all related session management and token refresh flows. Each path must keep working during the migration window with a feature flag, telemetry must distinguish old and new paths, and we need a rollback plan that does not require a database restore. The new identity provider's API is documented but limits us to 100 requests per second per client which may force us to add a caching tier. Coordinate with security review and have a dry run on staging at least one week before the production cutover.

notes: Edge case: very long prompt. Title must be <=80 chars; estimate should be large (>=13).
